metadata.no_exif: No EXIF data found in this file.

library.exif_sorting_note: Enable EXIF Reading in Settings to use this option.

presets.title: Presets
presets.empty: No presets saved yet. Create your own, import from a file, or explore community presets.

ai.fill_remove: Fill selection to remove the object.
ai.fill_surround: Fill selection based on surrounding pixels.
ai.fill_prompt: Describe what you want to generate in the selected area.
ai.not_connected: AI Connector not connected, basic inpainting is required.
ai.basic_desc: Basic inpainting is quicker but not generative. Uncheck to use AI Connector with a text prompt.
ai.simple_only: Only simple inpainting available. Connect backend for generative features.
ai.drop_new_edit: Drop here to create a new edit

settings.title: Settings
settings.theme_desc: Change the look and feel of the application.
settings.adaptive_theme_desc: Dynamically changes editor colors based on the current image.
settings.exif_reading_desc: Read EXIF data (ISO, aperture, etc.) on folder load at the cost of slower folder loading when using EXIF sorting.
settings.xmp_sync_desc: Sync ratings, color labels and tags to standard XMP sidecar files for compatibility with other photo editors.
settings.create_xmp_desc: Automatically create a new XMP sidecar file if one does not exist for an image. (Requires XMP Sync)
settings.folder_counts_desc: Show the number of images inside folders when hovering over the folder tree.
settings.transparency_desc: Enables or disables transparency effects for the application window. Relaunch required.
settings.adj_visibility_desc: Hide adjustment sections you don't use often to simplify the editing panel. Your settings will be preserved and applied even when hidden.
settings.my_lenses_desc: Create a list of your frequently used lenses to quickly access them in the Lens Correction panel.
settings.ai_tagging_desc: Enables automatic image tagging using an AI (CLIP) model. This will download an additional model and impact performance while browsing folders. Tags are used for searching a folder.
settings.max_tags_desc: The maximum number of tags to generate per image.
settings.custom_tag_list_desc: If provided, the AI will ONLY use tags from this list, overriding RapidRAW's built-in list. Tagging works only in English.
settings.no_custom_tags: No custom AI tags (Using built-in list)
settings.tagging_shortcuts_desc: A list of tags that will appear as shortcuts in the tagging context menu.
settings.preview_resolution_desc: Determines the maximum resolution of the preview. Lower values significantly improve performance.
settings.live_previews_desc: Update the preview immediately while dragging sliders. Disable this if the interface feels laggy during adjustments.
settings.thumbnail_resolution_desc: Determines the resolution of generated library thumbnails. Higher values produce sharper images during loading.
settings.processing_backend_desc: Select the graphics API. 'Auto' is recommended. May fix crashes on some systems.
settings.linux_compat_desc: Enable workarounds for common GPU driver and display server issues. Disable this to enable full GPU acceleration.
settings.restart_notice: Changes to the processing engine require an application restart to take effect.
settings.ai_flexibility_desc: RapidRAW's AI is built for flexibility. Choose your ideal workflow, from fast local tools to powerful self-hosting.
settings.ai_connector_address_desc: Enter the address and port of your running AI Connector instance. Required for generative AI features.
settings.clear_cache_desc: This will delete all cached thumbnail images. They will be regenerated automatically as you browse your library.
settings.log_path_error: Could not retrieve log file path.
settings.confirm_sidecar_msg:
Are you sure you want to delete all sidecar files?

This will permanently remove all your edits for all images inside the current base folder and its subfolders.
settings.clearing_ai_tags_msg: Clearing AI tags from all sidecar files...
settings.confirm_ai_tag_msg:
Are you sure you want to remove all AI-generated tags from all images in the current base folder?

This will not affect user-added tags. This action cannot be undone.
settings.clearing_all_tags_msg: Clearing all tags from sidecar files...
settings.all_tags_cleared: {{count}} files updated. All non-color tags removed.
settings.confirm_all_tag_msg:
Are you sure you want to remove all AI-generated and user-added tags from all images in the current base folder?

This action cannot be undone.
settings.transparency_enable_msg:
Are you sure you want to enable window transparency effects?
These effects may reduce application performance.
The application will relaunch to make this change.
settings.transparency_disable_msg:
Are you sure you want to disable window transparency effects?
The application will relaunch to make this change.
settings.special_thanks_intro: A huge thank you to the following projects that were very important in the development of RapidRAW:
settings.special_thanks_you_desc: For using and supporting RapidRAW. Your interest keeps this project alive and evolving.
settings.special_thanks_rawler: For the excellent Rust crate that provides the foundation for RAW file processing in this project.
settings.special_thanks_lensfun: For its invaluable open-source library and comprehensive database for automatic lens correction.
settings.special_thanks_negpy: For the inspiration behind the negative conversion logic.
settings.special_thanks_lama: For the powerful & simple image inpainting model, which enables content-aware fill and object removal.
settings.special_thanks_sam2: For providing the foundation model used for the AI subject detection capabilities.
settings.special_thanks_u2net: For providing the robust architecture used for the AI sky and foreground detection capabilities.
settings.special_thanks_depth: For the powerful monocular depth estimation model that enables the AI depth masking capabilities.
settings.special_thanks_nind: For providing AI models that power the AI noise reduction capabilities in RapidRAW.
settings.special_thanks_darktable: For some reference implementations that guided parts of this work.
settings.confirm_cache_msg:
Are you sure you want to clear the thumbnail cache?

All thumbnails will need to be regenerated, which may be slow for large folders.
settings.clear_ai_tags_action_desc: This will remove all AI-generated tags from your .rrdata files in the current base folder. User-added tags will be kept.
settings.clear_all_tags_action_desc: This will remove all AI-generated and user-added tags from your .rrdata files in the current base folder. Color labels will be kept.
settings.static_preview_desc: The editor renders the image at a fixed resolution. This mode is the fastest and most consistent, making it ideal for lower-end hardware where smooth performance is prioritized over pixel-perfect zoom.
settings.dynamic_preview_desc: The editor renders the preview to match your display's actual pixel density. This ensures that every detail is represented with 1:1 pixel accuracy, providing maximum clarity when zooming and checking focus.
settings.static_preview_resolution_desc: Sets the resolution for static previews like crop mode, lens correction, and perspective tools. Does not affect the main editor preview.
settings.render_scale_desc: Scales the render resolution relative to your display. Lower values improve performance on high-resolution screens at the cost of some sharpness.
settings.high_dpi_desc: Render previews at your screen's native {{dpr}}x physical pixel resolution. Produces the sharpest possible preview but uses significantly more memory.
settings.high_dpi_standard_desc: This setting only affects high-DPI displays. Your current display is standard resolution.
settings.live_preview_quality_desc: Controls the resolution and compression of the image while dragging sliders. Lower quality significantly improves responsiveness.
settings.highlight_recovery_desc: Controls how much detail is recovered from clipped highlights in RAW files. Higher values recover more detail but can introduce purple artefacts.
settings.linear_raw_desc: Fixes color casts or pink tint in some DNG files. Controls how already processed LinearRAW data is interpreted.
settings.builtin_ai_desc: Integrated directly into RapidRAW, these features run entirely on your computer. They are fast, free, and require no setup, making them ideal for everyday workflow acceleration.
settings.self_hosted_desc: For users with a capable GPU who want maximum control, connect RapidRAW to your own Connector server. This gives you full control for technical workflows.
settings.cloud_service_desc: For those who want a simpler solution, an optional subscription provides the same high-quality results as self-hosting without any hassle. This is the most convenient option and the best way to support the project.
settings.cloud_service_github: Keep an eye on the GitHub page to be notified when the cloud service is available.
settings.clear_sidecar_action_desc: This will delete all .rrdata files (containing your edits) within the current base folder:
settings.clear_cache_action_desc: This will delete all cached thumbnail images. They will be regenerated automatically as you browse your library.
settings.view_logs_desc: View the application's log file for troubleshooting. The log is located at:
settings.keybind_star_rating: Set star rating for selected image(s)
settings.keybind_color_label: Set color label for selected image(s)

tooltips.zoom_custom: Click to enter custom zoom percentage
tooltips.open_map: Click to open map in a new tab
tooltips.nind_no_gpu: NIND Denoise does not yet support GPU acceleration due to dependency limitations.

modals.transform_mask_warning: Transforming updates base geometry. Existing masks may shift, and AI masks must be regenerated.
modals.cull_all_unique: All images seem to be unique and sharp.
modals.cull_similarity_lower: Lower is stricter (exact duplicates). Higher is looser (near duplicates). A value of 24-32 is recommended.
modals.cull_blur_lower: Images with a sharpness score below this value are flagged. Higher is stricter.
modals.denoise_description: Remove noise from your image using AI-powered or traditional denoising.
modals.hdr_processing_note: This may take a few minutes depending on the number and size of your exposures.
modals.hdr_description_count: Combine {{count}} bracketed exposures into a single High Dynamic Range image.
modals.hdr_description: Combine your bracketed exposures into a single High Dynamic Range image.
modals.panorama_processing_note: This may take a few minutes depending on the number and size of images.
modals.panorama_description_count: Combine {{count}} overlapping images into a seamless panorama.
modals.panorama_description: Combine your overlapping images into a seamless panorama.
modals.denoise_processing_note: This may take a few minutes depending on image size and selected method.
modals.denoise_gpu_note: NIND Denoise does not yet support GPU acceleration due to dependency limitations.
modals.copy_paste_merge_desc: Adds your copied changes, leaving other settings untouched.
modals.copy_paste_replace_desc: Overwrites all selected settings, resetting the rest to their defaults.
modals.lens_not_found_hint: Lens correction may not be available for all lenses. Auto-detection relies on EXIF data.
modals.lens_mask_warning: Lens correction updates base geometry. Existing masks may shift, and AI masks must be regenerated.
modals.import_settings_trash: Files will be moved to the system trash.
modals.delete_vc_title: Delete Image and All Virtual Copies?
modals.delete_vc_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this image and all of its virtual copies? This action cannot be undone.
modals.delete_single_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this image? This action cannot be undone. Right-click for more options (e.g., deleting associated files).
modals.delete_multi_message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete these {{count}} images? This action cannot be undone. Right-click for more options (e.g., deleting associated files).

masks.title: Masking
masks.drop_to_create: Drop here to create a new mask
masks.add_to_mask_or_create: Add {{name}} to Current Mask or Create New (Right-click)
